name: 🍰Dippin Hip Bounce
description:
Bring the heat to the dance floor with the Dippin Hip Bounce!
This trendy urban hip-hop emote is all about rhythm, attitude, and unmatched energy. Start high, drop it low into a deep squat, and bring it right back up with a smooth hip sway and rhythmic bounce.

Whether you are hanging out with friends in your favorite city roleplay game, vibing to the music at a virtual concert, or just showing off your avatar's streetwear drip, this freestyle dance animation is guaranteed to hype up the crowd. Inspired by high-energy dancehall beats and modern street dance trends, it is the ultimate move for players who want to stand out and express themselves. Hit the beat perfectly, match the rhythm, and let your avatar own the spotlight!
